para_trans: Assistant Superintendent / Chief Clerk / Constable
From the cadre of Auditor / Accountant (Group C)
Superintendent and equivalent, General State Service Group-B
(Administrative Branch) Revised by promotion to this cadre
regarding the placement.
Government of Maharashtra
Department of School Education and Sports
GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER: NISOCIO 3625 / E-1731926 / PRASH-2
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400032
Date: July 1, 2026
Read-
Government Order No. Nisuchi 3625 / E-1114073 / PRASH-2, dated 12.03.2026.
Government Orders -
Read here Assistant Superintendent / Chief Clerk / Constable by Government Order
Auditors / Accountants (Group C) Superintendents of Cadre Personnel and equivalent, General State Services (Group B)
(Administration Branch) [Pay Scale S-14: Rs. 38600-122800] subject to the conditions prescribed in this post.
A temporary promotion has been made. However, there is a partial change in the rank of the following officer:
By doing so, his revised posting will be as shown in the table below in Column No. 4 vacant posts
is being done.
The Commissioner (Education), Pune, in accordance with this order, appointed the officer of the revised rank within the prescribed period.
Make sure you join the given position and submit a report to the government.
Do it.
table_trans: A. The name of the officer
Superintendent (Sarasay), District Institute of Education and Training, Sindhudurg
